arts.ttl: Player “often receives offers” – Nottingham Forest bid thrown in mix again ahead of transfer fight
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Turkish media, Galatasaray forward Barış Alper Yılmaz is being lined for an almighty summer battle. The 24-year-old has been linked with a move to Nottingham Forest since his performances in Euro 2024 and there were claims an offer came in from the English club last summer.
